raw_text:
Principal Full Stack Engineer
Vertex Systems — Building scalable, intelligent infrastructure for the

modern enterprise

Location

San Francisco, CA (Remote-first, occasional in-office)

Employment Type

Full-time

Compensation

$280,000 - $380,000 USD annually

The Opportunity

We are seeking an exceptional Principal Full Stack Engineer to join Vertex
Systems and define the technical direction of our platform architecture. As
a Principal engineer, you will lead cross-functional technical initiatives,

mentor senior engineers, and shape our long-term technology strategy across
frontend, backend, and infrastructure domains. This role requires 12+ years

of experience building and scaling production systems, a proven track
record of architectural leadership, and deep expertise across the full

stack. You will work directly with our VP of Engineering and executive team
to establish technical standards, make critical architectural decisions,

and guide the evolution of our platform to support our ambitious growth
roadmap.

About Vertex Systems

Vertex Systems is a Series B SaaS infrastructure company headquartered in

San Francisco that helps enterprises manage complex distributed systems and
real-time data workflows. We serve over 200 customers ranging from Fortune
500 companies to high-growth startups. Our platform processes 50+ billion
events daily and is trusted by organizations across finance, healthcare,

and e-commerce.

Day-to-Day

Define and evolve the organization-wide technical architecture and
technology strategy, ensuring decisions balance scalability,
maintainability, and business requirements across frontend, backend, and

infrastructure layers

Lead architectural design reviews and RFC (Request for Comments)
processes for major technical initiatives, providing authoritative

technical guidance on complex system design decisions

Mentor and develop senior and staff-level engineers, conducting technical
mentorship sessions and creating growth opportunities that build

organizational technical depth

 Establish coding standards, architectural patterns, and best practices
across the full stack; own the design and implementation of critical
infrastructure components (API layers, service mesh, caching strategies)

Design and implement scalable backend services using Node.js and
TypeScript, with expertise in both REST and GraphQL API design patterns
for high-traffic systems

Lead the migration and optimization of PostgreSQL databases and data
pipelines to support real-time analytics and growing query volumes at
scale

Champion the adoption of cloud-native practices on AWS/GCP, defining

infrastructure-as-code standards, CI/CD pipelines, and deployment
strategies

Collaborate with product leadership to translate business requirements
into technical roadmap items; advocate for technical excellence while
balancing business velocity

Participate in on-call rotation for critical system incidents, driving

post-mortems and establishing resilience improvements across the platform

You Have

12+ years of professional software engineering experience with a strong
track record of building and operating production systems at scale

Expert-level proficiency in backend systems design using Node.js and
TypeScript; demonstrated ability to architect and build high-performance
APIs serving millions of requests

Deep experience with relational database design, optimization, and
scaling (PostgreSQL preferred); expertise in query optimization, indexing
strategies, and data modeling

Proven architectural leadership experience: designing systems that have
scaled to handle billions of events, millions of concurrent users, or
significant data volumes

Advanced knowledge of cloud infrastructure (AWS and/or GCP), including
networking, storage, compute services, and infrastructure-as-code tooling

Strong expertise in at least one modern frontend framework (React
preferred) and ability to lead full-stack architectural decisions that
span client and server

Demonstrated ability to mentor and influence senior engineers and
architect-level peers; experience establishing technical standards and
best practices at scale

Bonus

Experience designing and operating GraphQL APIs in production
environments; expertise in schema design, performance optimization, and
federation patterns

 Track record of successful platform migrations or major architectural
refactors that improved system performance or developer velocity

Open-source contributions or leadership; experience building tools or
frameworks used by the broader engineering community

Background in data systems, distributed computing, or real-time
analytics; familiarity with event streaming architectures or time-series
databases

Experience leading technical strategy and roadmapping in Series A/B stage
companies or similarly fast-growing organizations

Our Stack

Node.js   TypeScript   React   PostgreSQL   GraphQL   REST APIs   AWS   Docker & Kubernetes   Redis

Terraform

What We Offer

Competitive equity package (0.5% - 1.5% depending on level) with standard
vesting

Comprehensive health insurance: medical, dental, vision with 100% premium
coverage for employees

Unlimited PTO and 10 company holidays; strong work-life balance culture
and remote-first flexibility

Professional development budget of $5,000 annually for conferences,

courses, and learning resources

$1,500 home office setup stipend; ongoing monthly stipend for internet

and workspace expenses

Parental leave (16 weeks paid for all parents) and fertility/family-

building benefits

Annual company offsites in interesting locations; team bonding budget and
social events

Commuter benefits and subsidized gym memberships; comprehensive wellness
program

Apply

Please submit your resume, a brief cover letter highlighting your most

significant architectural contributions, and a link to your GitHub profile

or portfolio demonstrating your full-stack expertise. Apply via our careers
page at careers.vertexsystems.com/jobs/principal-full-stack-engineer or

email careers@vertexsystems.com with subject line 'Principal Full Stack
Engineer Application'. Candidates will be prioritized if they include

examples of systems they've scaled to handle significant traffic or data
volumes.
